skip_intro.description: Skip intro videos and logo screens to reach the main menu
skip_intro.steps: WAIT:3000 ESCAPE WAIT:1000 ESCAPE WAIT:1000 ESCAPE WAIT:2000

start_new_game.description: From main menu, start a new game (Bolivia - Tiwanaku)
start_new_game.steps: RETURN WAIT:1500 RETURN WAIT:1500 RETURN WAIT:5000

continue_game.description: From main menu, continue last saved game

load_croft_manor.description: From main menu, navigate to Croft Manor (typically last in level select)
load_croft_manor.steps: RETURN WAIT:1500 DOWN DOWN DOWN DOWN DOWN DOWN DOWN DOWN RETURN WAIT:5000

camera_spin_test.description: Slowly spin the camera 360 degrees for culling/visibility testing
camera_spin_test.steps: WAIT:1000 RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT RIGHT

walk_forward.description: Walk forward for a few seconds (for testing movement/rendering)
walk_forward.steps: W W W W W W W W W W WAIT:500
